title: DB_WoS_UDC
author: Luchian Luchian, Adriana Emanuella
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Database SQLite containing data extracted from Web of Science, prepared, through data scrubbing and data normalizing, for the statistical analysis and bibliometric indicators extraction presented in the master thesis "The Scientific Activity of the University of A Coruña through Bibliometric Indicators (Web of Science, 2010-2014)" - DOI 10.5281/zenodo.153868 

 For the database management use SQLite Manager (Firefox Add-on).
steps_raw:
Database SQLite containing data extracted from Web of Science, prepared, through data scrubbing and data normalizing, for the statistical analysis and bibliometric indicators extraction presented in the master thesis "The Scientific Activity of the University of A Coruña through Bibliometric Indicators (Web of Science, 2010-2014)" - DOI 10.5281/zenodo.153868 

 For the database management use SQLite Manager (Firefox Add-on).
keywords: bibliometric indicators, scientific activity, University of A Coruña
